title: bolbitis quoyana
intro: Bolbitis quoyana, also known as the Quoy's fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, belonging to the genus Bolbitis. Traditionally, Bolbitis quoyana has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health. Bolbitis quoyana is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
